metadata.description: Tunable atomic task limits for dispatcher validation

files_touched.description: Maximum number of files a single task can touch. Limits scope complexity.

est_lines_changed.description: Maximum estimated lines changed in a task. Keeps tasks focused and manageable.

test_command_required.description: Whether test_command is mandatory in all tasks. Ensures verifiability and quality gates.

est_local_effort_mins.description: Maximum estimated effort in minutes. Prevents runaway tasks and ensures timely completion.

decomposition_max_depth.description: Maximum recursive decomposition depth before escalation to Claude. Prevents infinite decomposition loops.

enforcement.validation_blocking: If ANY criterion fails, task is BLOCKED immediately and requires re-decomposition
enforcement.dispatcher_behavior: dispatcher.cjs must validate all limits before assigning to local model
enforcement.escalation_trigger: On third decomposition failure (depth 3), create permission request and escalate to Claude
